appliedUpdates.description: Added factual Panora API authentication note in .factory/library/panora-api-auth-requirement.md after observing HTTP 401 without x-api-key for GET /swap/quote.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Align mission feature skillName values with actually available runtime skills (e.g., avoid assigning `frontend-ui-worker` when only `frontend-worker` is installed in worker runtime).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Fix feature metadata still references frontend-ui-worker while review/handoff evidence shows runtime fallback to frontend-worker.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update Panora guidance to state quote/swap endpoints may require x-api-key and to source this key from env-managed secrets, not assumptions about unauthenticated access.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Mission AGENTS says no key needed, but scrutiny review observed 401 from GET /swap/quote without x-api-key.
